name: revex-backend
description: REVEX Marketplace B2B — Backend API (Node.js + Express + PostgreSQL)

scripts.db:setup: psql -U postgres -c 'CREATE DATABASE revex_db;' && psql -U postgres -d revex_db -f ../database/schema.sql && psql -U postgres -d revex_db -f ../database/seed.sql
scripts.db:reset: psql -U postgres -c 'DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS revex_db;' && npm run db:setup
